title: Nursery Rhyme. DXII. Natural History.
content:
Gray goose and gander,
            Waft your wings together,
        And carry the good king's daughter
            Over the one strand river.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
